calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff/Respondent Darrel Adams Jr. in Propera Persona.
Atty. Julio Ramos (415-469-9787) representing Defendant/Appellant Riptide LLC.

This matter came on calendar this day having been continued from Department 206 for court trial.

Darrel Adams Jr. testifies on his own behalf, Plaintiff/Respondent. The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted.

Exhibit 1 - Photocopy of pamphlet from The Department of Fair Employment & Housing.
Exhibit 2 - Photographs of sign from the Riptide Bar.

Julio Ramos, Esq. cross examines Mr. Adams on behalf of Defendants/Appellants Riptide LLC. The Court takes judicial notice that the letter to the Department of Fair Employment and Housing was sent and received.
Darrel Adams Jr. redirects on his own behalf.

Damian Samuel testifies on behalf of Defendants/Appellants Riptide LLC. Darrel Adams Jr. conducts cross examination of the witness on behalf of himself. Mr. Ramos conducts redirect examination of the witness on behalf of Defendants/Appellants Riptide LLC.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
